12. Effects of a Mutilated Planet.
If a planet is in Vikala state at birth, the native will be deprived of his place, or position, dirty-
hearted, poor and will wander here and there. He will be frightened by his enemies.
13. Effects of a Planet in Khalavastha.
Should a planet be in Khalavastha, the native will grieve in sorrow, due to maintaining his wife
(the native cannot maintain even his wife), will lose all his wealth, will have an impure mind
and be never free from miseries.
14. Retrogression in Exaltation.
If a planet is retrograde, while in exaltation, it produces no effect (nothing good will happen). This
is the view held by some. Even, if it is in exaltation by its entry in retrograde motion from the
next Sign (for example Jupiter entering Cancer from Leo), the effect is same, for it takes
unduly long time in such trajectory.
15. Different Effects.
A planet in exaltation is considered highly strong.
